case_title: THOMAS MCGRATH ET AL VS. GENEVIEVE L. FONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,121.51 FILED BY MCGRATH, THOMAS CASSINA, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIEVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGRATH, THOMAS CASSINA, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIEVE L.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIEVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-06-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIEVE L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD FONG WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGRATH, THOMAS CASSINA, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONG, GENEVIEVE L. FONG, RICHARD Y. $5,121.51 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,211.51, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED FOR DEFENDANT RICHARD FONG, ONLY. STATEMENT OF DECISION BY COURT IS ATTACHED TO THE JUDGMENT; SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
